sub: Trusted by 200+ publishers and educational organizations worldwide, Quarterfold delivers high quality printed products across global markets.

credentials.title: Certified and audited
credentials.description: FSC Chain of Custody, ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015, ISO/IEC 27001:2022, Sedex membership.

credentials.title: Editorial and prepress support in English
credentials.description: With a single point of contact across time zones.

credentials.title: Surge capacity without surge pricing
credentials.description: Across 20 printing towers, 5 sheet fed presses and a full finishing line up including 17 folders and 6 automatic thread sewing machines.

credentials.title: Dedicated account manager
credentials.description: For North American and UK clients, with documentation, customs and freight handled end to end.

africa.name: Africa
africa.alt: Two African children reading an illustrated storybook together
africa.body: Ministries of Education and government institutions across Nigeria, Kenya, Uganda, Ghana, Cameroon, Rwanda, Tanzania, Zambia, Cote d'Ivoire, the Democratic Republic of Congo and more.

asia.name: Asia
asia.alt: Asian schoolgirl in uniform reading a book in a classroom
asia.body: Complete end to end solutions, print, kit, pack and deliver directly to schools, for state textbook bureaus, national banks and leading education companies.

europe.name: USA, Europe & Latin America
europe.alt: Smiling schoolboy holding a book in a library
europe.body: Activity books, trade books, colouring books and stationery for leading publishers and major retail chains across the US, UK, Mexico, Spain and Germany.

ledger.heroStory: Books for the Tanzania Institute of Education: 4M of them delivered within 60 days.
ledger.heroStoryFallback: Books for a national education programme: 4M of them delivered within 60 days.
